initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, MAX(ds.points) AS max_points
FROM drivers d
JOIN driverStandings ds ON d.driverId = ds.driverId
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality
ORDER BY SUM(ds.wins) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, MAX(ds.points) AS max_points

ORDER BY SUM(ds.wins) DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT drivers.forename, drivers.surname, drivers.nationality, MAX(driverStandings.points) AS max_points
FROM drivers
JOIN driverStandings ON drivers.driverId = driverStandings.driverId
GROUP BY drivers.driverId, drivers.forename, drivers.surname, drivers.nationality
ORDER BY SUM(driverStandings.wins) DESC
LIMIT 1
